data.description:
## Incident Overview

`validate.sh --ci` fails the shim-refs check with 7 violations in:
- plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/SKILL.md:656
- plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/prompts/dispatch-fix-batch.md:8,9
- plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/prompts/file-overlap-resolution.md:12
- plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/prompts/session-init.md:24,37,53

Lines 37 and 53 of session-init.md already have `# shim-exempt` but missing the required `: <reason>` suffix per check-shim-refs.sh format requirements.

Blocks scripts/release.sh execution.
data.title: [validate.sh]: shim-refs check fails -> 7 violations in debug-everything skill files
